description: "Use when editing or discussing NetworkSort.cs, NetworkSort.Unrolled.cs, NetworkSort.Simd.cs, or NetworkSort.Simd.Arm.cs. These files are auto-generated by generate_unrolled.cs and must not be edited by hand."
applyTo: "SortingNetworks/NetworkSort.cs, SortingNetworks/NetworkSort.Unrolled.cs, SortingNetworks/NetworkSort.Simd.cs, SortingNetworks/NetworkSort.Simd.Arm.cs"
---
# Auto-Generated File Protection

These files are generated by `scripts/generate_unrolled.cs` and contain the marker:
```
// <auto-generated>
// This file was generated by generate_unrolled.cs
// Do not edit manually.
// </auto-generated>
```

- **Never edit these files directly.** All changes must go through `scripts/generate_unrolled.cs`.
- If a bug or feature requires changes to `NetworkSort.cs`, `NetworkSort.Unrolled.cs`, `NetworkSort.Simd.cs`, or `NetworkSort.Simd.Arm.cs`, modify the generator script instead and re-run it.
- Run the generator: `dotnet run scripts/generate_unrolled.cs`
- After regenerating, run `dotnet test` to verify correctness.

# CI and Platform Coverage

The CI matrix in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` tests on three platforms:
- **`ubuntu-latest`** and **`windows-latest`**: x64 runners — exercise the AVX2 (8-bit) and AVX-512 (16-bit) SIMD paths.
- **`macos-latest`**: ARM64 (Apple Silicon) runner — exercises the AdvSimd/NEON ARM64 SIMD paths.

All SIMD dispatch paths (x86 and ARM64) are already covered by CI. Do not flag ARM64 code paths as untested.

# Generator Code Style

When modifying `scripts/generate_unrolled.cs`, prefer C# raw string literals (`"""`) with interpolation (`$$"""`) for emitting multi-line code blocks, rather than sequences of `w.WriteLine()` calls. Match the style used in `WriteApiFile`, `WriteStringApi`, `WriteFileHeader`, etc.
